title: Tears of Steel (2012)
description: In the future, a team of scientists and warriors gather at the Oude Kerk, an old building in Amsterdam, to stage an event from the past to save the world from destructive robots.

title: Spring (2019)
description: A shepherd girl and her dog, who face ancient spirits in order to continue the cycle of life. This poetic and visually stunning short film was written and directed by Andy Goralczyk, inspired by his childhood in the mountains of Germany.
